content.en:
The years have passed.

During this period, many fifth-stage great ancestors fell into the Eternal True Ruins, and many invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestors escaped from the Eternal True Ruins.

Of course.

As long as you succeed in coming out alive, almost all of them have good gains.

There are also great ancestors who have obtained incomparably precious treasures, but they almost never say it.

this day.

Ye Tian finally succeeded in replicating the Infinite Realm Armor again, so he asked the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior to continue exploring the Eternal True Ruins with the copy body.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went to the place where he was attacked.

......

"This is it!"

Ye Tian saw the traces of the original fight, as well as the fragments of some creatures.

After some investigation, he was sure of one thing, that is, the Great Ancestor who attacked him had fallen.

"I didn't expect an invincible fifth-stage great ancestor to fall like this!"

Ye Tian sighed.

The fall of that Great Ancestor is afraid that it is enough to shock many forces, after all, in addition to the Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, the Invincible-level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor is already the most powerful Great Ancestor, which is comparable to the Infinite Realm Armor.

There are not many such ancestors!

Originally, Ye Tian still wanted to seek revenge on the other party, but now that the other party has fallen, he doesn't need revenge!

"Let's go somewhere else!"

Ye Tian left here.

In the years that followed, he would bring back some treasures as long as he found them.

Gradually, he accumulated more and more resources, but the copy body was also severely damaged many times, so he changed the copy body many times.

this day.

Ye Tian was besieged by some creatures again, unable to escape, the replica body was killed, and the Infinite Realm armor was also shattered.

After that, he took a long time to replicate an immeasurable armor again.

I have to say that there are really a lot of good things in the Eternal True Ruins, and the materials needed for the Aotaki liquid have already been collected by him, and they are about to be collected.

It's still a little short, but you can buy it after you go out.

Therefore, he can refine the Qinglong liquid by himself at that time!

......

"It's ......"

Ye Tian saw a golden river in the depths of the Eternal True Ruins, and after identifying it, he confirmed that there was an incomparably precious resource flowing in this river—the Eternal Golden Pith!

This kind of resource is extremely precious, and it can quickly help the fourth-stage Great Ancestor refine his whole body, and it can also help the fifth-stage Great Ancestor to cultivate immeasurable magical powers.

"With so much Eternal Golden Essence, there should be hope to help me complete the eleventh full-body refinement, or even the twelfth full-body refinement!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

So, he directly collected these eternal golden pice, and then hid it here to practice.

He didn't even dare to leave, for fear of encountering danger on the way back, causing these eternal golden pith to be lost, which would be a pity!

In the days that followed, his replica body was silently cultivated here, refining his whole body with all his might.

The long years passed.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian refined a large amount of Eternal Golden Essence and completed the eleventh full-body refinement.

This breakthrough made his strength soar.

"Go to the Huanyu Tower to see if you can break through the third layer, if you can break through the third layer, it means that my strength has been ranked at the peak of the fifth stage of combat power!"

Ye Tian muttered.

As an elite member of the Cosmos Tower, he has the right to break into the tower for free three times, and if he hasn't broken into the next layer after three permissions, he needs to get another Cosmos Order.

Under normal circumstances, the members of the Huanyu Tower will only come to the tower to ensure that their strength is stable and they can break through to the next level.

However, he had three free chances, so he didn't care if he failed or not.

Universal Tower.

Ye Tian came to the third layer, but this time he was facing another creature.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian and this creature are constantly fighting, he is injured, and the other party is also injured.

I don't know how long it took, Ye Tian's replica body finally ran out of energy, and his body collapsed and died, but the other party was also severely injured by him.

This time I failed to break through the third level.

However, Ye Tian was very excited.

"I should have the peak fifth stage combat power, but it is a weaker peak fifth stage combat power, and it is still far from the invincible fifth stage combat power, but it is also the peak fifth stage combat power!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

Eternal ruins.

Ye Tian's replica body continued to cultivate, and he was going to impact the twelfth full-body refinement.

Of course, other replicant bodies can continue to explore.

Gradually, another long time passed.

Just when the Eternal Golden Marrow was about to be exhausted, he finally completed the twelfth full-body tempering, and his strength increased again.

At this time, his strength was definitely not weak in the peak fifth stage combat power.

If he really goes to the Universal Tower again, he is ninety percent sure that he will succeed in breaking into the Tower.

However, he was not in a hurry to break into the Cosmos Tower.

After he completed the thirteenth full-body tempering, it was not too late to break into the third layer of the Cosmos Tower, and at that time he would be 100% successful.

As the years passed, Ye Tian's position in the Eternal True Ruins became farther and farther away.

This position is a place where many invincible-level fifth-stage great ancestors dare not come, so the probability of falling will be as high as more than fifty percent.

However, Ye Tian is not afraid, it's a big deal that the copy body falls, and the Infinite Realm armor shatters.

But as long as he obtains the precious treasure, he will get the treasure and leave, bringing the treasure back safely.

......

"This is the core area of the Eternal Ruins!"

Ye Tian had just set foot in this area and found something good.

"Dragon-patterned steel gold!"

Ye Tian saw a piece of metal that was straight into the boulder and immediately recognized it.

Dragon pattern steel gold is one of the ten materials needed to cultivate the ten-armed golden body, he originally collected two, and now with this piece of dragon pattern steel gold, he has made up three.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian's heart moved, and he directly smashed the boulder, grabbed the dragon pattern steel gold, and put it away.

Subsequently, he sent the dragon pattern steel gold back, and without encountering any major danger on the way, he safely delivered the dragon pattern steel gold to one of the replica bodies.

After returning the dragon pattern steel gold, he continued to delve into the core area of the Eternal True Ruins.

This time I was not very lucky, and I encountered a creature that was very close to the fifth stage of the Breaking Realm, and was killed by it.

Fortunately, the other party had no interest in the Infinite Realm Armor, so he let the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior escape back.

After that, he tried again, avoiding this area and entering the core area from other areas.

In this way, Ye Tian tried again and again, and gained more and more in the core area.
